extracted_information: The web content provides comprehensive details on USDA hemp testing standards and compliance requirements for laboratories, including THC potency analysis, sampling protocols, and lab certifications. It also outlines consequences for non-compliance and potential future changes to the Farm Bill.

specifications.sampling_timeline: up to 30 days before anticipated harvest
specifications.sampling_method: cuttings from the flower material of hemp plants, approximately 5 to 8 inches from the 'main stem', 'terminal bud', or 'central cola' of the flowering top.
specifications.sampling_size_exceedance_limit: no more than 1% of plants in the lot would exceed acceptable hemp THC level
specifications.measurement_uncertainty: Labs must estimate and report THC measurement uncertainty for each test result.

temporal_info.USDA_rules_effective_date: 2021 Final Rule for the Domestic Production of Hemp

references.description: Cornell University research on THC accumulation
MJBizDaily article on Farm Bill amendment
